title: Sqast
description: Changes Ghasts and Happy Ghasts to look like Squids!
body:
This simple resource pack changes Ghasts and Happy Ghasts to look like Squids :D
it also changes the textures for Sqast/Happy Sqast Spawn Eggs, Sqast Tears, "Tears" Music Disc, and the Dried Sqast
![All of the new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2pG34OFC/images/4ea8d8906a05216e9a3188353748599e15307504.png)

**This pack will change the names of Ghasts and their related items if your language is set to one of the following:**
- English US,
- English UK,
- German (Deutsch) Thanks to [foenichs](https://modrinth.com/user/foenichs) for helping translate :)
- Pirate Speak,
- LOLCAT,
- Shakespearean English,
- English Upsidedown,
- English Australian,
- English Canadian,
- English New Zealand,
- or Anglish (Oned Riches)


Links:

[Glow Squid version and more!](https://modrinth.com/collection/IMDfKUco) (All versions of Sqast)

[This Pack on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/sqast-java/) (For comments)

[Bedrock Version](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/sqast/) (Planet Minecraft)

[Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/HN2E9pVMK7) For bugs, suggestions, and feedback :)
